name: 06-16-pkcs-m3-retrieval-context-pack-design
title: brainstorm: PKCS M3 retrieval and Context Pack design
creator: tantless
notes: M3 design brainstorm started. User confirmed baseline-first on 2026-06-17 and pointed out baseline requires a real corpus. M3A0 corpus bootstrap and M3A1 baseline eval scaffold are complete. M3C added eval schema v2 and simple-vs-planned comparison reporting. M3D added the first expanded diagnostic query set and report-only baseline. M3E fixed the remaining M3D missing_alias and evidence_selection_gap failures with deterministic glossary/query-signal expansion plus query-aware Context Pack evidence selection.

meta.m3a1_baseline_observation: Chinese natural no-marker eval queries produced 6/6 empty results with simple FTS; English title-style smoke queries hit expected sources.
meta.m3d_observation: 28-row locked+diagnostic report: planned_top_10_hit_rate 0.9643, locked_regression_pass_rate 1.0, remaining failures missing_alias=1 and evidence_selection_gap=1.
meta.m3e_observation: 28-row locked+diagnostic report: planned_top_10_hit_rate 1.0, planned_context_support_rate 1.0, locked_regression_pass_rate 1.0, and all failure classes 0.
meta.recommended_next_step: M3F diagnostic trend gate or expanded diagnostics
